Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reasoning: The course's central theme is 'war and peace, conflict and cooperation' between nations (Target 16.1). The study of 'international regimes' explicitly aligns with building effective institutions (Target 16.6) and global governance (Target 16.8).
